## Validation

- [ ] Go tests: `go test ./apps/api/...`
- [ ] Web build: `pnpm build:web`
- [ ] Desktop validation when applicable
- [ ] Docs/progress updated when applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows desktop-first product direction.
- [ ] Does not store secrets in plain text.
- [ ] Updates `docs/EXECUTION_PROGRESS.md` for implementation work.
- [ ] Updates `docs/TASK_BACKLOG.md` if task status changed.
- [ ] Updates `docs/DECISIONS.md` if a lasting decision was made.
